text_block_list.text:
One day, Tokai Teio and Mejiro McQueen are
summoned to the student council office.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hello.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What's the important thing you've gotta tell me,
Prez?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Apologies for summoning you both here out of
the blue. There is something I'd like to ask of you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ooh, what is it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'd like you both to be poster models for the URA.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Modeling for a poster?! Woohoo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That would be an honor indeed. I gladly accept
the request.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But why am I being paired up with McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Because I recommended her. Do you have an
issue with that?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You personally recommended her, Prez? Then I
guess that's fine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm also a little curious as to why Teio and I have
been selected...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Why, you ask? Hmm. I could tell you, but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This seems like a golden opportunity. I have an
additional request for you two.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Use your time to think about why the other was
chosen.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What?! You want me to figure out why you picked her? Not even why you picked me?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You're overthinking it. Just approach it as a
simple challenge I've set out for you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Aww, it's not simple at all! How am I supposed to
know why she chose you?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Besides, we're only having to rack our brains about this 'cause you insisted on asking!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I merely inquired as to the reason. I believe the
real issue is your willingness to accept whatever
the president says without a second thought!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I blindly accepted the request... Well,
anyway. We both agreed to this, so we'll just have
to do the work.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I know! Why don't we make things interesting?
Let's turn this into a competition!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A competition? And how exactly will we decide
the winner?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
We give our answers to Prez and whoever has the
right answer is the winner. How's that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Interesting... Very well, then. But if we really are
going to compete, I will show you no mercy. Is
that clear?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Bring it on! Okay, ready... GO!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What?! Why are you running in the same direction I am?! Do not hinder my case!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My plan is to ask everyone in the classroom!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What?! That was my idea! Don't you copy me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I am not copying you! And could you please desist with that terrible habit you have of blaming others?

The two of them push and shove each other as
they race down the hallway.
